name: Palms Open the Southern Gate
description: A gust of wind opens all closed doors and portals within sight.

name: Tongue of Eris
description: A creature you can see must answer d4 questions truthfully.

name: Te Deum
description: d2 corpses rise from the dead to serve you for Presence hours.

name: Lucy-Fires Levitation
description: A creature or object levitates for Presence rounds.

name: Aegis of Sykhar
description: A magical protective sphere shields against one attack.

name: Metzhuotl Unveils
description: See through illusions, darkness, and invisibility for 10 minutes.

name: Falkarthian Teleport
description: Teleport to a known location. Test Presence DR14 or end up d100 feet off.

name: Nine Violet Signs Unknot the Storm
description: Call down lightning dealing d6 damage to all nearby enemies.

name: All Things End
description: A single creature takes d8 damage, no save.

name: Enochian Syntax
description: Command a creature. Powerful entities may resist.

name: Grace for a Sinner
description: Heal d6 HP on a creature you touch.

name: Whispers Pass the Gate
description: Communicate with a recently dead creature.

name: Grace of a Dead Saint
description: Invisible holy shield absorbs d4 damage.

name: Eldritch Chain
description: Bind a creature in glowing chains. Strength DR14 to break free.

name: Foul Psychopomp
description: Summon a spirit guide to lead the way for Presence hours.

name: False Dawn
description: Blinding light, all nearby enemies test Agility DR14 or be blinded one round.

name: Hermetic Step
description: Move silently and unseen for Presence rounds.

name: Roskilde Finger
description: Point at a creature; it takes d6 holy damage.

name: Brackish Communion
description: Purify food and water or poison it.

name: He Consumes
description: A dark entity devours a creature with fewer HP than the caster.
